name: evergreen-demo
description: 常青 Evergreen — a living-document freshness agent. Each load-bearing claim in a document is bound to a real source; when sources change, the agent pinpoints the exact stale sentence, drafts a minimal patch (review-before-apply), and maintains a document freshness score. A real deterministic engine maps claim<->source versions and recomputes freshness, so the before/after value is measured, not faked. Static frontend demo (mock refund-SOP corpus, mock source timeline, no backend/LLM/external API).
